channel.title: Beat Saber on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Beat Saber on yexca'Blog

item.title: Adding Custom Song Packs to Beat Saber
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash-lite Introduction I recently bought Beat Saber (on the Argentinian store), and wanted to add custom songs. I found a tutorial by WGzeyu in the Steam reviews. Since my goal is simple, and their tutorial is quite comprehensive, I’m writing this article to summarize it. 1. Preparation Note: Update 2022.03.25: I checked today and mods for 1.20.0 are available. See step two directly. The data restoration section has also been …
